audit_items.proof_trace: cache_destroy() makes zero allocations itself, so the universal quantifier in the assertion has an empty domain and is vacuously satisfied. All memory it manages (slab items via STAILQ while-loop, cache->name, and the cache struct) is freed unconditionally with no early-exit paths, no return statements, and no conditional branches in the function body. Items given to callers via cache_alloc are excluded by documented API contract (cache.h:L66-67).
